name: Yuvarelakia Soupa Avgolemono (Meat-rice "Barrel" Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, veal or lamb
2 tbsp Chopped dill, mint or basil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the meat, grated onion, garlic, rice, 3 tablespoons chopped parsley, mint, oregano, salt, and pepper, and 1 egg, slightly beaten. Knead for a few minutes, then shape into walnut-sized barrels and set aside.
2. In a soup pot, bring water or stock to boil with the chopped onion, celery, and carrot, and season with salt and pepper. Lower heat and add the meat-rice barrels. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, then remove from heat.
3. To prepare avgolemono, beat the remaining eggs for 2 minutes. Gradually add lemon juice, continuing to beat. Add hot broth by droplets until all is incorporated. Return to soup and gently heat without boiling. Serve hot, garnished with parsley.
Note: This soup can be made without additional vegetables in the liquid. For a simplified version, add 1/2 cup canned tomato sauce and reduce water to 4 1/2 cups.
